description: Canonical catalog of MCP servers the Ara team uses. ae reads this to wire up Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT. The static directory page at /mcp also renders from this file.

ara_endpoint.description: Ara's own managed MCP server — hosts connectors that don't have official MCPs or that need Ara-specific defaults baked in.

servers.name: Ara Connectors
servers.summary: Railway (60 tools) + Resend + Instacart + Higgsfield + Blaxel + Engain + Linq + Postiz + Braintrust + Axiom. Resend defaults to hello@ara.so. Railway is pre-loaded with Ara project IDs. Axiom pre-wired to the 'logs' dataset.

servers.name: PostHog
servers.summary: ~200 tools. Insights, feature flags, experiments, dashboards, surveys, session recordings, error tracking, LLM analytics, HogQL.

servers.name: Linear
servers.summary: Issues, projects, cycles, initiatives, comments, documents.

servers.name: Supabase
servers.summary: Projects, databases, edge functions, migrations, advisors, logs.

servers.name: Vercel
servers.summary: Projects, deployments, domains, env vars, logs.

servers.name: Hunter
servers.summary: Email finder, verifier, domain search, leads, campaigns.

servers.name: Gmail
servers.summary: Drafts, threads, labels. Use the native Google connector in each client.
